texto: O world, world when I was younger I thought there was some order governing you and your deeds. But now you seem to be a labyrinth of errors, a frightful desert, a den of wild beasts, a game in which men move in circles…a stony field, a meadow full of serpents, a flowering but barren orchard, a spring of cares, a river of tears, a sea of suffering, a vain hope.
explicacao: Citação de Fernando de Rojas sobre temas ligados a amor. “O world, world when I was younger I thought there was some order governing you and your deeds. Bu…” articula amor, death, vida em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como luto e vida.
